---
bibliography: "argument-validity-proof.bib"
number-sections: true
crossref:
  chapters: true
---

{{< include /assets/macros/macros.qmd >}}

# Argument, Validity & Proof {#sec-argument-validity-proof .chapter}

{{< include introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include arguments.qmd >}}

{{< include sets.qmd >}}

## References {.unnumbered}
